ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on the given date */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends issued on the given date */,
  "stock_splits" REAL /* Stock splits on the given date */,
  "ipo_price" REAL /* IPO price of the stock */,
  "floating_pl_pct" REAL /* Percentage of floating profit and loss */,
  "change_pct" REAL /* Change percentage compared to the previous close */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the IPO */,
  "peak_price" REAL /* Peak price of the stock since its IPO */,
  "trailing_stop_pct" REAL /* Trailing stop percentage set by the user */,
  "trailing_stop_price" REAL /* Trailing stop price calculated from the high */,
  "sell_price" REAL /* Sell price of the stock when sold */,
  "realized_pl_pct" REAL /* Realized profit and loss percentage from the transaction */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days since the stock data entry */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remarks for the stock data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock, indicating its volatility relative to the market */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of IPO for the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index the stock belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "realized_pl" REAL /* Realized profit or loss from the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "unrealized_pl" REAL /* Unrealized profit or loss from the stock */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
